item.aardvarksweirdzoology.farmers_guide: Farmers Guide to Crops of the Galaxy
item.aardvarksweirdzoology.geneticists_g: Geneticists Guide to DNA and Fossils
item.aardvarksweirdzoology.weedy_sea_dra: Weedy Sea Dragon Sheared Spawn Egg
item.aardvarkswildredux.farmers_guideto_: Farmers Guide to Crops of the Galaxy
item.aardvarkswildredux.geneticists_guid: Geneticists Guide to DNA and Fossils
item.aardvarkswildredux.weedy_sea_dragon: Weedy Sea Dragon Sheared Spawn Egg
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.behemoth_statu: The behemoth shrine channels the power of the Behemoth, a huge Hebrew shapeshifting monster. You can use it to transform DNA into behemoth power, and then "shift" that power into other types of DNA.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.climbing_claws: In order to use Climbing Claws, you need two, one in each hand. Then, you can gradually climb up blocks by right clicking them.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.comb_info_jei: The comb is a tool that allows you to collect the delicate hairs of the echidna, megalonyx, and markhor. It doesn't last very long though.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.cuttlefish_jei: Cuttlefish will change color while in your hand to match any nearby(within 6 blocks) rare ores.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.dn_aizer_info_: The DNAizer is a block that will turn any of the three types of fossils in it into either a random piece of DNA, or sand. You need four pieces of DNA to craft a spawn egg
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.fake_plants: The fake plants are "plants" that can be placed on any solid surface, and provide a place to hide while in them.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.fruit_dish_jei: The food dishes fed nearby animals, and while not necessary, will greatly increase the joy of nearby animals of matching diets(check the guide to see what an animal eats). Refill it by right clicking with food, and check it's level by sneaking.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.guide_book: The Guide Book is a tool that will show you information on all of the species you've discovered with the investigator. It will display traits for each creature, telling you what that creature's behaviors are like, and information on it's real-world biology.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.investigator_j: The investigator is a tool that can be used when you discover a new species of animal to add it's information to the guide!
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.joyizer_inform: Joyizers collect joy from nearby animals and convert them into a set resource at the start of each day. Set which species you'd like to collect joy for by putting it's DNA into the machine. Raise an animal's joy levels by designing a good living space.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.leviathan_shri: The Leviathan shrine channels the power of the Leviathan, a huge Hebrew shapeshifting sea monster. You can use it to transform DNA into leviathan  power, and then "shift" that power into other types of DNA.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.mothra_info_je: The egg of Mothra, it will give you a power-boost when you're around it. It will randomly hatch into Mothra herself, who also gives you a boost.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.plow_jei: Plows are tools that will tear through snow, crops, and plants while in your hand. They make harvesting a little easier- or are great for some quick landscaping too!
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.quartz_cutter_: When used in a crafting table alongside 8 stones, you can craft quartz.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.rod_of_lorenzi: This tool will flash electricity in your hand when there is a metal within 6 blocks under you.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.shamir_informa: A mythical Jewish creature, the Shamir is unmatched in it's ability to remove stones. When placed, it will tear throw nearby granite, andesite, diorite, or calcite.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.sifter: The Sifter is a tool that can be used to extract fossils from sand, dirt, soul sand, gravel, or clay. It has a low chance of giving a fossil or flint, or seeds.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.spawn_egg_base: The Spawn Egg Base when combined with four of the same animal's DNA and four quartz, will allow you to make a spawn egg.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.starof_solomon: Solomon's star is a mythical symbol that King Solomon used to control demons. It can be used to direct the path of the Shamir.
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.vampire_esscen: Magic esscences are rare items that you can get from a handful of deep-sea creatures. They just might be the key ingredients needed for a powerful recipe!
jei.aardvarksweirdzoology.water_wings_je: The waterwings are a tool that can give you a swimming boost when used in the water. Simply left click while swimming to get a boost in that direction.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.climbing_claws_j_: In order to use Climbing Claws, you need two, one in each hand. Then, you can gradually climb up blocks by right clicking them.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.comb_info_jei: The comb is a tool that allows you to collect the delicate hairs of the echidna, megalonyx, and markhor. It doesn't last very long though.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.cuttlefish_jei_in: Cuttlefish will change color while in your hand to match any nearby(within 6 blocks) rare ores.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.dn_aizer_info_jei: The DNAizer is a block that will turn any of the three types of fossils in it into either a random piece of DNA, or sand. You need four pieces of DNA to craft a spawn egg
jei.aardvarkswildredux.fake_plants: The fake plants are "plants" that can be placed on any solid surface, and provide a place to hide while in them.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.fruit_dish_jei: The Fruit Dish feeds nearby Frugavores, and while not necessary, will greatly increase the joy of nearby fruit-eating animals(check the guide to see what an animal eats). Refill it by right clicking with food, and check it's level by sneaking.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.joyizer_informati: Joyizers collect joy from nearby animals and convert them into a set resource at the start of each day. Set which species you'd like to collect joy for by putting it's DNA into the machine. Raise an animal's joy levels by designing a good living space.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.mothra_info_jei: The egg of Mothra, it will give you a power-boost when you're around it. It will randomly hatch into Mothra herself, who also gives you a boost.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.quartz_cutter_inf: When used in a crafting table alongside 8 stones, you can craft quartz.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.rod_of_lorenzini_: This tool will flash electricity in your hand when there is a metal within 6 blocks under you.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.shamir_informatio: A mythical Jewish creature, the Shamir is unmatched in it's ability to remove stones. When placed, it will tear throw nearby granite, andesite, diorite, or calcite.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.sifter: The Sifter is a tool that can be used to extract fossils from sand, dirt, soul sand, gravel, or clay. It has a low chance of giving a fossil or flint, or seeds.
jei.aardvarkswildredux.spawn_egg_base_je: The Spawn Egg Base when combined with four of the same animal's DNA and four quartz, will allow you to make a spawn egg.
